debug_info.goal:
a b c : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c
h₁ : c < a + b
h₂ : b < a + c
h₃ : a < b + c
⊢ a ^ 2 * (b + c - a) + b ^ 2 * (c + a - b) + c ^ 2 * (a + b - c) ≤ 3 * a * b * c

proof: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a), sq_nonneg ((a - b) * (a + b - c)), sq_nonneg ((b - c) * (b + c - a)), sq_nonneg ((c - a) * (c + a - b)), h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2, mul_pos h₀.1 (mul_pos h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2)]
successful_attempts: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a), sq_nonneg ((a - b) * (a + b - c)), sq_nonneg ((b - c) * (b + c - a)), sq_nonneg ((c - a) * (c + a - b)), h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2, mul_pos h₀.1 (mul_pos h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2)]
